author: Susan "Lady D" Damon
release_boundary: Line-edited review batch. This is not final KDP upload approval.

source_files.library_source: /Users/IDC2.5/Documents/LADY D/Production Library/01 Surrendering to God's Love/01 Manuscript/Month 03 - March/Days 081-087 Manuscript.md

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Listen for Covenant Mercy into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Let God name one pressure before worry does; His mercy can bring the day under His sky.
edits.reason: Turns creation naming and ordered rhythm into a direct response before anxiety defines the day.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Stand in the Father's Welcome into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Pause before the demanding thing today; the Father calls your name before He asks your yes.
edits.reason: Keeps Abraham's named interruption personal and grace-grounded before obedience continues.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Let Grace Form Beloved Identity into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Rename one hard place by provision today; you were seen there, not abandoned there.
edits.reason: Connects beloved identity to testimony without denying the frightening place.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Behold Love That Finds You into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Stay quiet after relief today; the God who interrupted fear may still be speaking.
edits.reason: Preserves the second-call lens and asks the reader to keep listening after crisis relief.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Follow Grace Before Striving into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Surrender the beloved concern without surrendering God's character; grace can lead where fear cannot.
edits.reason: Repairs the title mismatch while refusing performance pressure or harmful Genesis 22 application.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Rest in Mercy in the Morning into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Thank God for one quiet continuity today; mercy may be carrying more than you noticed.
edits.reason: Lets the genealogy-continuity context become a practical gratitude step.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Wake Up to the Father's Patience into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Rest this Saturday with the unanswered question; the Father's patience can hold what you cannot see.
edits.reason: Preserves seventh-day Sabbath rest and Isaac's honest question without forcing premature answers.

judge_auditor_loops.evidence: All 7 impact lines now vary by entry theme and avoid the repeated `Let the Father's love carry` frame.
Sabbath remains seventh-day/Saturday; commandment-keeping and obedience stay framed as response to grace.
The batch file now has zero old Volume 1 morning-impact templates.
Repo source, public mirror, and Production Library manuscript receive the same edited text.

next_loop: Continue author-voice line edits in seven-day or month-close batches, then regenerate masters/interiors and update the review site after each meaningful gate.
